zh-tw.title: 幹話語錄
zh-tw.description: 一句話戳破所有正能量謊言——犀利、諷刺、但說的都是你心裡話的幹話精選

en.title: Witty Comebacks
en.description: One-liners that cut through the noise — sharp, sardonic, and suspiciously accurate about everyday life

items.sourceNote: 負能量語錄參考，重新創作諷刺正向思考主題

zh-tw.content:
有人說：保持正向，一切都會好起來的。

我說：好，那我去正向地想想我的帳單要怎麼辦。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個動不動就叫你「想開一點」的朋友，讓他知道情緒價值不等於解決方案
variations: 保持樂觀是對的。但樂觀不會幫你繳水電費，這一點請也樂觀地接受。

en.content:
Someone told me: just stay positive, everything will work out.

I replied: great. I'll positively figure out what to do about my bills.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who responds to every problem with 'just think positive' — gentle pushback delivered with a smile
variations: Staying optimistic is valid. But optimism won't pay your utilities. Please accept that fact optimistically.

items.sourceNote: 幹話語錄參考，重新創作夢想與現實主題

zh-tw.content:
夢想很重要，一定要去追。

但房租比夢想更準時，建議先把房租算清楚，再出發。
zh-tw.editorNote: 適合傳給正在說「我想辭職去追夢」的朋友，幫他多想兩秒
variations: 追夢的路上，記得帶足夠的存款，不然中途就會先追到7-11打工。

en.content:
Dreams are important. Absolutely pursue them.

But rent is more punctual than any dream. I suggest sorting that out first before you set off.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who just announced they're quitting their job to follow their passion — a gentle reality check
variations: On the road to chasing your dreams, make sure you pack enough savings — otherwise you'll end up chasing a part-time job first.

items.sourceNote: 靠北語錄參考，重新創作金錢快樂主題

zh-tw.content:
錢買不到快樂——

說這句話的人，顯然沒有試過下班後直接打開外送App，
然後在三分鐘內完全快樂起來。
zh-tw.editorNote: 下班沒力氣煮飯時傳給自己看，同時按下訂單確認，非常應景
variations: 我不確定錢能不能買到快樂，但我很確定沒有錢會讓我不快樂。兩件事。

en.content:
Money can't buy happiness —

Obviously said by someone who has never opened a food delivery app after work
and felt completely better within three minutes.
en.editorNote: Read this while placing your takeout order after a long day — the timing will feel exactly right
variations: I'm not sure money buys happiness. I am sure that not having money causes unhappiness. These are two separate claims.

items.sourceNote: 幽默語錄參考，重新創作做自己主題

zh-tw.content:
做自己就好，不需要改變。

但如果你自己是個很難相處的人，
那這句話可能需要加一個但書。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個說完「我就是這樣」就什麼都不管的朋友，讓他思考一下
variations: 「做自己」是很好的建議，前提是你的「自己」不會讓周圍的人過得很辛苦。

en.content:
Just be yourself — there's no need to change.

Unless 'yourself' is someone who's genuinely difficult to be around.
In that case, a small exception may apply.
en.editorNote: Share with the person who uses 'I'm just being myself' as a reason to avoid accountability — they'll either get it or they won't
variations: 'Be yourself' is great advice, provided your 'self' doesn't make life harder for everyone around you.

items.sourceNote: 負能量幹話語錄參考，重新創作努力成功主題

zh-tw.content:
吃苦是成功的必要條件。

那請問現在比我更辛苦的人，是不是快要比我更成功了？

我很期待他的好消息。
zh-tw.editorNote: 聽完主管說「年輕就是要吃苦」之後，在心裡默念這段話，可以有效維持表情穩定
variations: 如果努力就一定會成功，那現在失敗的人，代表他們之前還不夠努力。這個邏輯很乾淨。

en.content:
Suffering builds character and leads to success.

So the people who are struggling more than me right now — they must be on the verge of enormous success.

I genuinely look forward to their announcements.
en.editorNote: Recite this internally after someone tells you 'hard work always pays off' — keeps your expression neutral while your brain does the math
variations: If effort always leads to success, then people who are currently failing simply weren't working hard enough before. Very clean logic.

items.sourceNote: 幹話語錄參考，重新創作想太多樂觀主題

zh-tw.content:
不要想太多，樂觀一點。

但萬一我想太多之後，發現問題真的存在，
那是不是應該謝謝我當初有認真想？
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個每次說「你想太多了」但事後又說「你怎麼都沒預料到」的人，一次解決兩個問題
variations: 過度思考有時候叫做焦慮，有時候叫做預防。取決於你後來有沒有被證明是對的。

en.content:
Don't overthink it. Just be optimistic.

But what if I overthink it and discover the problem is real?
Shouldn't you then thank me for overthinking?
en.editorNote: Send to whoever says 'you're overthinking' but later says 'why didn't you see this coming?' — resolves both complaints at once
variations: Overthinking is sometimes called anxiety. Sometimes it's called preparation. The difference is whether you turned out to be right.

items.sourceNote: 搞笑語錄參考，重新創作時間療癒主題

zh-tw.content:
時間是最好的良藥，任何傷都能治。

可惜時間不能退款，也不能換成假期，
目前沒有其他功能。
zh-tw.editorNote: 失戀或心情不好時自嘲用，也適合傳給那個叫你「時間久了就好了」的朋友
variations: 時間確實能治癒，只是治癒的速度和你付出的等待時間不一定成正比。

en.content:
Time is the best medicine — it heals everything.

Unfortunately, time cannot be refunded or exchanged for vacation days.
No additional features are available.
en.editorNote: Use as self-deprecating humor after a rough patch, or send to whoever told you 'you'll feel better with time'
variations: Time does heal things. The healing timeline, however, is not guaranteed to match the waiting time you invested.

items.sourceNote: 負能量語錄參考，重新創作努力必成功主題

zh-tw.content:
只要夠努力，一定會成功的。

那麼多認真工作的人，可以先進來我這邊坐一下，
我們討論一下那個「一定」是怎麼定義的。
zh-tw.editorNote: 職場激勵演講結束後，默念這段話讓自己回到正常狀態，效果顯著
variations: 「努力就會成功」這句話的問題在於，它描述了一個相關性，但跳過了所有的例外情況。

en.content:
Work hard enough and you will definitely succeed.

Anyone who's been working seriously for years — please come sit with me.
I'd like to discuss what 'definitely' means.
en.editorNote: Mentally recite after a corporate motivational speech to return to normal cognitive function
variations: The problem with 'hard work equals success' is that it describes a correlation while skipping over all the exceptions.

items.sourceNote: 幹話語錄參考，重新創作笑一下主題

zh-tw.content:
笑一下嘛，笑一下又不會怎樣。

好，如果你能告訴我笑完帳單就消失了，
我立刻笑給你看，而且笑得很真誠。
zh-tw.editorNote: 有人叫你「開心一點」卻沒有提供任何解決方案時，這句話傳給他，非常精準
variations: 我很願意笑，但笑是情緒，不是解決方法。這兩件事情我分得很清楚。

en.content:
Come on, just smile. It won't kill you.

If you can confirm that smiling makes the bills disappear,
I will smile immediately, and I'll mean it.
en.editorNote: Send to whoever tells you to 'cheer up' without offering any actual help — precise and efficient
variations: I'm very willing to smile. But smiling is an emotion, not a solution. I keep these two things separate.

items.sourceNote: 靠北語錄參考，重新創作在意別人眼光主題

zh-tw.content:
不要在意別人的眼光，做自己最重要。

——來自一個從來沒有在工作考評裡被寫過
「與他人協作有待加強」的人。
zh-tw.editorNote: 傳給那個說完「不在意別人眼光」但其實很怕得罪人的朋友，看他會不會笑出來
variations: 「不要在意別人眼光」在某些場合是智慧，在某些場合是藉口，差別在於後果由誰承擔。

en.content:
Don't care what people think. Just be yourself.

— Advice from someone who has never received
'needs to improve collaboration' on a performance review.
en.editorNote: Send to the friend who says they don't care what people think but spends an hour crafting every message — see if they laugh
variations: 'Stop caring what people think' is wisdom in some contexts and an excuse in others. The difference is who ends up dealing with the consequences.

items.sourceNote: 搞笑語錄參考，重新創作人生苦短及時行樂主題

zh-tw.content:
人生苦短，要及時行樂。

說的也是，正是因為及時行樂，
所以現在帳戶也苦。
算是一種因果報應。
zh-tw.editorNote: 月底看著帳戶餘額時傳給自己，既是安慰也是解釋，一魚兩吃
variations: 及時行樂的代價，就是不及時的時候也要行樂，然後要還。這個循環我很熟悉。

en.content:
Life is short — live in the moment.

Fair point. And because I've been living in the moment so consistently,
my bank account is now also very short.
A kind of karmic balance.
en.editorNote: Read while staring at your end-of-month balance — equally a comfort and an explanation
variations: The cost of seizing the day is that when the day is over, you still have to pay for it. A cycle I know well.

items.sourceNote: 靠北語錄參考，重新創作世界美好多看看主題

zh-tw.content:
這個世界很美好，要多出去走走看看。

謝謝，等我把待辦清單清完，
我馬上去看。
大概下週，最快。
zh-tw.editorNote: 節假日被問「你去哪裡玩了嗎」的時候，這個回答既說明了現狀，又保留了未來的可能性
variations: 世界很大，我也很想去看。但目前我的行事曆跟我說不行，我尊重它的意見。

en.content:
The world is beautiful — you should get out and see more of it.

Thanks, I'll get right on that once I finish my to-do list.
Probably next week. Earliest.
en.editorNote: Use when someone asks if you 'got out' during the holiday — honest, non-committal, and technically leaves the future open
variations: The world is large and I'd love to see it. My calendar disagrees. I respect its perspective.

items.sourceNote: 搞笑語錄參考，重新創作天生樂觀心靈導師主題

zh-tw.content:
有些人天生樂觀，什麼都看得開。

然後他們就去當心靈導師了，
把「看得開」包裝成課程，賣給看不開的人，
賺了一份很開心的薪水。
zh-tw.editorNote: 看到某個勵志帳號又在賣課程時，可以傳給懂的朋友，是一種無聲的默契
variations: 最會說「放下執念」的人，通常對自己的收入執念得很深。這不是諷刺，這是觀察。

en.content:
Some people are naturally optimistic — they let everything go.

So they become life coaches,
package 'letting go' into a course, sell it to people who can't,
and earn a very cheerful income.
en.editorNote: Send to a friend when you both spot a motivational influencer promoting their new paid course — a moment of shared understanding
variations: The people who talk most about 'releasing attachment' tend to be deeply attached to their revenue. Not a criticism. Just an observation.

items.sourceNote: 負能量語錄參考，重新創作永不放棄主題

zh-tw.content:
不管發生什麼事，都不要輕易放棄。

有時候放棄也是一種策略，
只是這個版本的故事，版權還沒有被廣泛流通。
zh-tw.editorNote: 在決定要不要放棄某件事的時候，可以傳給自己，給自己一個不同的角度
variations: 「放棄」和「停損」是同一個行為，語言不同，情緒的接受度差很多。

en.content:
No matter what happens, never give up.

Sometimes quitting is a valid strategy.
That version just hasn't gone viral yet.
en.editorNote: Send to yourself when you're weighing whether to walk away from something — permission to see it from a different angle
variations: 'Giving up' and 'cutting losses' describe the same action. The word choice makes a big difference in how easily we accept it.

items.sourceNote: 幽默語錄參考，重新創作活出意義主題

zh-tw.content:
人活著要有意義，不能虛度光陰。

謝謝提醒，我剛才正在認真研究朋友的限時動態，
已經很有意義了，謝謝關心。
zh-tw.editorNote: 有人說你在浪費時間的時候，這個回答既防禦又幽默，而且技術上不算說謊
variations: 意義是主觀的，對不對？所以今天認真滑了三小時手機，也是一種自我實現。

en.content:
Live a meaningful life. Don't waste your time.

Thanks for the reminder. I was just thoroughly analyzing my friend's stories.
Already very meaningful. Appreciate the concern.
en.editorNote: Use when someone implies you're being unproductive — defensive, humorous, and technically not a lie
variations: Meaning is subjective, right? So spending three focused hours scrolling today is also a form of self-actualization.
